entrypoints.docker_chat: docker compose run --rm engine node dist/index.js chat
entrypoints.docker_action: docker compose run --rm engine node dist/index.js action <action-name> '<json-args>'

actions.name: telegram.analyze
actions.description: Fetch new Telegram posts, extract articles, generate embeddings, and refresh topics.

actions.name: plan.show
actions.description: List current content plan items and statuses.

actions.name: plan.schedule
actions.description: Create draft content plan items for candidate topics.

actions.name: plan.approve
actions.description: Approve a scheduled plan item so it can be drafted.

actions.name: article.write
actions.description: Draft approved articles, or draft for a named topic.
